dismissalText.commentary: Phil Salt c Noor Ahmad b Dube 46 (30b 3x4 2x6 54m) SR: 153.33

dismissalComment.html: Dube does the trick! Inspired bowling change, and Salt perishes! This is banged into the track outside off. Seems like the slower variant and it comes off very sluggishly. Salt has a wild swipe at it and shanks it a mile up. Noor runs in from deep square and snaffles up the chance. Timely breakthrough for CSK!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Dube b Kamboj 28 (18b 2x4 1x6 22m) SR: 155.55

dismissalComment.html: bashed in short, and Kohli bites the dust! Dube with a bit of redemption! A little outside off. Kohli advances and tries to fetch it from outside the line. Gets a little under it and miscues it badly. Dube, stationed at long on, runs in and does the rest, despite the close proximity of Noor, who had run towards Dube from mid wicket. Kamboj with the breakthrough, and there is stunned silence at the Chinnaswamy!

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal b Overton 50 (29b 5x4 2x6 52m) SR: 172.41

dismissalComment.html: leg stump out of the ground, and Overton provides a bit of respite to CSK! Yorker speared in on leg stump. Padikkal walks across and tries to be too funky. Looks for the scoop but gets across far too much to access the ball. Misses it and sees his leg stump flat on the ground soon after. Overton is pumped, but Padikkal has done his job too through these middle overs!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Dube b Kamboj 28 (18b 2x4 1x6 22m) SR: 155.55

dismissalComment.html: bashed in short, and Kohli bites the dust! Dube with a bit of redemption! A little outside off. Kohli advances and tries to fetch it from outside the line. Gets a little under it and miscues it badly. Dube, stationed at long on, runs in and does the rest, despite the close proximity of Noor, who had run towards Dube from mid wicket. Kamboj with the breakthrough, and there is stunned silence at the Chinnaswamy!

dismissalText.commentary: Phil Salt c Noor Ahmad b Dube 46 (30b 3x4 2x6 54m) SR: 153.33

dismissalComment.html: Dube does the trick! Inspired bowling change, and Salt perishes! This is banged into the track outside off. Seems like the slower variant and it comes off very sluggishly. Salt has a wild swipe at it and shanks it a mile up. Noor runs in from deep square and snaffles up the chance. Timely breakthrough for CSK!

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal b Overton 50 (29b 5x4 2x6 52m) SR: 172.41

dismissalComment.html: leg stump out of the ground, and Overton provides a bit of respite to CSK! Yorker speared in on leg stump. Padikkal walks across and tries to be too funky. Looks for the scoop but gets across far too much to access the ball. Misses it and sees his leg stump flat on the ground soon after. Overton is pumped, but Padikkal has done his job too through these middle overs!

dismissalText.commentary: Sarfaraz Khan st †Sharma b Pandya 50 (25b 8x4 2x6 25m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: stumped by a country mile! Darted in on a length on middle and leg. Sarfaraz hares down and has a wild mow at it. Nowhere near the pitch of the ball, and the ball comes in with the angle. Past Sarfaraz's flailing blade and Jitesh whips off the bails, with Sarfaraz stranded. Sarfaraz departs for 50 off 25, but it was fun while it lasted!

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Padikkal b Duffy 7 (3b 0x4 1x6 3m) SR: 233.33

dismissalComment.html: six and out! Duffy has the final word, and the CSK skipper's poor start to the tournament continues! Back of a length outside off. Shapes away late and Gaikwad goes nibbling at it. Gets a healthy nick and Padikkal gobbles it up to his right at slip. CSK's opening woes showing no signs of abating!

dismissalText.commentary: Shivam Dube c †Sharma b Abhinandan Singh 18 (13b 2x4 1x6 18m) SR: 138.46

dismissalComment.html: has that carried?! If it has, this is a world-class grab! Back of a length just outside off. Dube opens up his stance and swings for the hills. Gets an inside edge and Jitesh shows insane reflexes to lunge down low to his right and make it stick with his right mitt. Outstanding from Jitesh, and CSK are six down now!
